Title: Integer Comparison
Description:
Compares a data source from a brush against an integer (number).

Use this node with a flow control node that connnects to a condition.

Options.Description: The data source from the brush to compare against.
Options.Label: Data Source

Options.Description:
The integer (number) to compare against the data source.

Example: To do something if the Density is less than 50, do:

Data Source = Density
Operator = LessThan
Compare Value = 50
Then connect this node to a flow control node.
Options.Label: Compare Value
